build_sessions.description: Initial build — read PDFs, created memories.py, indicator_engine.py, alpaca_trader.py, journal.py, analyze.py. Crashed mid-generation of agent.py
build_sessions.note: 42.81k output tokens shown at crash. Input includes 6 PDFs, 3 text files, session chats, and multi-turn conversation.

build_sessions.description: Recovery — built agent.py, updated README, cleaned repo, added multi-timeframe analysis, live quotes, cron scheduling, token tracking
build_sessions.note: Estimate based on conversation length. Exact counts available in Cursor billing dashboard.

totals.note: These are estimates. The agent runs ZERO LLM tokens at runtime — all analysis is deterministic (math indicators + rule-based scoring). Token cost is build-only.

runtime_token_cost.explanation: The agent is 100% deterministic at runtime. No LLM is called. Indicators are computed mathematically, setups detected by rules, scoring by memories.py criteria. The only API calls are to Alpaca (market data + execution), which are free on paper trading.
